Strongly inclined toward something, resolved, determined, set, etc.; said mind, character, disposition, desires, etc, used with bent going college; bent mischief.
<botany> reedlike grass genus Agrostis, especially. Agrostis vulgaris, redtop. name also used many other grasses, esp. America.
<agriculture> neglected field broken ground; common; moor. "Bowmen bickered upon bent."
Origin: Beonet; akin OHG. Pinuz, Binse, rush, bent grass; unknown origin.
